title: About
content:
About

I am Juan Hernandez, a retired senior policy analyst with the U.S. Department of the Interior, where I worked on environmental regulation and land-management policy from 1982 until 2017. I live in West Annapolis, Maryland. These days I tutor GED students at the Annapolis library, lecture now and then on environmental policy, and write the occasional letter to the editor of the Capital Gazette. This page collects a few of those letters and reflections.

title: Contact
content:
Contact

You are welcome to reach me by email at juan.hernandez@gmail.com. I read every note, though at my pace I may be slow to answer. Letters intended for publication should go to the Capital Gazette directly.

title: Published Letters
content:
Published Letters

An archive of the letters to the editor and short op-eds I have written over the years, gathered here so I can keep track of them and so a reader can find the earlier ones. Most concern environmental and land-management policy, a few touch on local Annapolis matters, and now and again one is simply a reflection on a book that stayed with me.
